home.title: EasyIntake App
home.intro: Conversation-powered intake with structured data, validation, and handoff to your systems.
home.signedInBlurb: Use the dashboard for funnel health, handoff reliability, and operational KPIs across channels.

dashboard.title: Operations dashboard
dashboard.subtitle: Industry-agnostic view of intake, verification, completion, and transfer to your destinations — comparable across organizations and channels.

superAdmin.demoModeOn: You are viewing demo metrics (illustrative sample data).
superAdmin.liveModeOn: You are viewing live metrics from your intake API.

demo.banner: Demo mode: sample funnel and KPIs for walkthroughs — no intake API calls for this view.

conversion.hint: Illustrative conversion rates for layout and stakeholder demos only.

kpis.channelMixValue: Voice {voice, number}% · Messaging {messaging, number}% · Partner {partner, number}%

dashboard.liveDataNote: Metrics are computed from the latest intake sessions returned by your API (up to 100 rows). Status values are grouped into journey phases; conversion rates are approximate shares across that list, not a full analytics warehouse.
dashboard.loadErrorNote: Could not load sessions for this view. Confirm the web app can reach your intake API and that server-side auth (BFF token) is configured.

funnel.intakeDesc: Capture requests from voice, messaging, or partner events.
funnel.validateDesc: Confirm identity, eligibility, consent, and data quality rules.
funnel.closeDesc: Finalize agreement and payment or equivalent settlement step for your workflow.
funnel.transferDesc: Deliver structured records to CRM, case tools, webhooks, or warehouses.

conversion.liveHint: Percentages are derived from how many sessions in the current list sit at or beyond each phase (by status). They summarize the batch, not a historical funnel.
conversion.validateToClose: At or past close (of those past intake)
conversion.closeToTransfer: Transferred (of those at close or beyond)

kpis.channelMixValue: Voice {voice, number}% · Messaging {messaging, number}% · Partner {partner, number}%

activity.empty: No sessions yet, or none returned for your account.

queue.title: Intake queue
queue.filterPlaceholder: Filter by session, status, vertical, or package…

session.title: Session
session.hitlPlaceholder: Approval actions will connect to the engine when available.
session.noVoiceChannel: No active voice leg for this session.
session.openLiveCallConfigure: Set NEXT_PUBLIC_AGENT_HTML_URL or NEXT_PUBLIC_API_URL to your apps/api origin (e.g. Railway) to enable the live call link.

voiceBridge.title: Voice agent console
voiceBridge.description: Open the realtime agent UI hosted on the intake API. Your browser tab will receive a fresh WebSocket token from this app.
voiceBridge.configureHint: Set NEXT_PUBLIC_AGENT_HTML_URL or NEXT_PUBLIC_API_URL (e.g. your Railway API origin) so the voice console link resolves.
voiceBridge.errorUnauthorized: You must be signed in to open the voice console.
voiceBridge.errorGeneric: Could not issue a token. Try again.
voiceBridge.errorConfigure: Could not build the agent URL. Check your environment variables.

live.title: Live Demo
live.subtitle: Share this screen while on a voice intake: connect to a Call SID, watch transcript and fields update from the engine.
live.agentInstructionHint: The Product / Form dropdown picks the demo line and the full application catalog (sections on the right).
live.errorCallSid: Enter a Call SID (or pick one from recent Twilio calls).
live.errorApiBase: Configure NEXT_PUBLIC_API_URL so the browser can open a WebSocket to the API.
live.errorToken: Could not get a WebSocket token. Sign in and ensure API_JWT_SECRET matches the API.
live.errorWs: WebSocket error. Check Call SID, token, and API URL.
live.twilioLoadError: Could not load Twilio calls (check API route and credentials).
live.twilioEmpty: No calls yet — place a test call or refresh after dialing.
live.transcriptEmpty: Transcript appears after you connect and speech is processed.
live.applicationPanelHint: Full catalog by section. Values update as the transcript is processed while you are connected.
live.applicationEmpty: No field catalog is available for this selection.
live.callEndedHint: Call ended — reconnect if you continue on a new leg.
live.pdfWrongPreset: Select Imm - N400 or NLG - Term Life to download a PDF for that template.
live.pdfDownloadError: Could not generate PDF. Check Anvil configuration and try again.
live.extractWrongPreset: Switch to a life insurance product to run extraction (not immigration N-400).
live.extractNeedCallSid: Enter a Call SID with a stored transcript.
live.extractError: Extraction failed. Check the Call SID and API logs.
live.extractPreservedCorrections: {count} field(s) were left unchanged to preserve manual corrections.
live.applicantLinkHint: Share this link with the applicant to complete their application.
live.agentAdviceEmpty: No missing fields for the current Product / Form selection.
live.crmNoRecordBody: No matching contact record in CRM yet. Connect and capture identity or contact fields to link a record.

settings.pageSubtitle: Connect your CRM to receive leads automatically.

organization.sectionHint: This profile can power your dashboard and future applicant experiences. Logo files are stored securely; a public link is saved on your Clerk organization.
organization.noOrgHint: Select an organization from your account menu, then return here to edit your organization profile.
organization.logoEmpty: No logo yet. Upload an image or fetch one from your website.
organization.fetchLogoHint: Uses the website URL above. We look for common icons and Open Graph images, then you can approve before it is stored.

errors.NO_ORG: Choose an organization in your account menu, then try again.
errors.FORBIDDEN: You don’t have permission to edit organization settings.
errors.VALIDATION: Check the website URL (https) and logo file type (PNG, JPEG, WebP, or GIF).
errors.CLERK: Could not save organization settings. Try again.
errors.UPLOAD_FAILED: Logo upload failed. Try again or pick a smaller file.
errors.BLOB_NOT_CONFIGURED: File storage is not configured (missing BLOB_READ_WRITE_TOKEN).
errors.NETWORK: Network error. Check your connection and try again.
errors.FETCH_FAILED: Could not find a suitable logo on that site. Try uploading a file instead.
errors.FETCH_NOT_HTML: That URL did not return a web page we could read.

users.sectionHint: Add people to your Clerk organization. They receive an email with a link to accept and sign in.

invite.dialogHint: We will email an invitation link so they can join your current organization.
invite.success: Invitation sent. They will get an email shortly.

errors.NO_ORG: Choose an organization in your account menu, then try again.
errors.FORBIDDEN: You don’t have permission to invite users.
errors.VALIDATION: Enter a valid name and email.
errors.CLERK: Could not send invitation. Check the email address or try again.
errors.NETWORK: Network error. Check your connection and try again.

crm.sectionHint: Connect Pipedrive or GoHighLevel to automatically send leads and applications.

addForm.pdfHint: Select an application PDF to map fields from.
addForm.manualHint: Add field labels your agents should capture for this application.
addForm.saveNote: Saving to your organization is not wired yet; this dialog previews the workflow.
addForm.contextDocsPrompt: Please upload any documents with applicant instructions, or information about the form/application that could be helpful.
addForm.contextDocsDecisionHint: These materials give our systems context for the form and will support future automated flows—such as decision trees and if/then rules—when generation is enabled for your workspace.
addForm.contextDocsAcceptHint: You can attach PDF, Word (.doc, .docx), plain text or Markdown, and images (PNG, JPEG, WebP).
